title: Amy's Industrious Mod
description: A mod all about adding friendly industrial resources like Rubber and Cotton, as well as fun blocks, tools and toys to add some flavor to your game!
body:
# ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/qDPkkwh3/images/885eb012fb3d4ddaa4430b9aa97e59cda4408101.png)
**An industrial material mod made for fun by a fun loving creature!**
![](https://i.imgur.com/gDgOd2n.png)
![](https://i.imgur.com/UoIBayo.png)
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/WWgPUhTvt3I" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Goal
The goal of this mod is to simply add fun industrial materials and gear, toys and blocks within the idea of a simple industrial revo lution located within your Minecraft game.

## Recipes!
Here Recipes will be listed for your all your industrial needs, so you cannot say there was never a guide for this mod!

### Rubber Tap and Wooden Basin
![](https://i.imgur.com/2aEbdmK.png)

A Rubber Tap can be placed on a Stripped Jungle Log to extract rubber from jungle tree!!

![](https://i.imgur.com/FqEbsRc.png)

A Wooden Basin collects liquid rubber that drips from a Rubber Tap!

### Raw Rubber Conversion 
![](https://i.imgur.com/RgM2JU1.gif)

Rubber can be compacted into blocks on a smaller scale!
 
### Sulfur, Treated Rubber and Smelting it!
![](https://i.imgur.com/zZkwiDK.gif)
![](https://i.imgur.com/5U8vZe8.png)

Sulfur can be found in ore forms in both the Overworld and the Nether! You may compact them into an ore block as well, as ugly as it appears.

![](https://i.imgur.com/WBVfEPp.png)
![](https://i.imgur.com/bCoIzgQ.png)

Ah yes, and we have treating and smelting rubber! Also a necessary step in making
### Vulcanized Rubber
![](https://i.imgur.com/4UGzXvV.gif)

### Cotton Conversion
![](https://i.imgur.com/OgFRWF4.gif)

Cotton is not as potent as wool of course, but it sure is fluffy and soft! (After you've gotten all the debris and lint out...)

![](https://i.imgur.com/Dzkk3QP.png)

Speaking of debris and lint, at the cost of your Boll, you may harvest extra cotton seed from it!

### More Recipes you might enjoy!
![](https://i.imgur.com/dhOmciA.gif) ![](https://i.imgur.com/iUtx68k.png) ![](https://i.imgur.com/gNu3xuI.gif) ![](https://i.imgur.com/zRhETXM.png) 

Rolls of Leather, Blocks of Tarp, Playing Balls and Boxing Gloves! Oh, what tons of fun to be had!
